title: SPARQL Update: DELETE, error: "Message: CL...: The array extend 1048576 is less than requested 1310721"
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Test1', 123.45);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (2, 'Test2', NULL);
UPDATE test_table SET value = value + 1 WHERE id = 1;
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL;
key_bug_features: SPARQL DELETE query exceeding array extend limit
